reviews.review_msg: Second class with Tony, same outcome. Provides a great baseline for the class all semester and then slams everyone with an outrageous final. Put in countless hours studying, but he chose to put the most difficult study questions on the final. Work hard on the assignmentsfitness tests to pump your mark up. Standard online kin class, all the same.

Spent a lot of time on unnecessary calculus that wasn't used for midterms. Diagrams in class were very unclear and often times blurry. TA marking is super subjective. Best way to prepare is reading through his theory notes on canvas, rather than going to lectures. Midterm averages were around 30%
I love this guy because I got A+!

Horrible. His lectures and the assigned readings were not coordinated with the syllabus, and his final exam asked questions that covered concepts that were not very related to any of the material that he or the TA indicated to us that we needed to know. I read these reviews and decided to take the class anyway... really wish I hadn't.
